violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of bread and tortillas were stored on the floor in the walk in freezer.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. A metal scoop was placed on a pan of water on the pizza prep cooler by the pizza oven. Ice scoop and handle was stored in the ice in the left ice bin.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Gray tape was placed on the gasket of the right door of the pizza prep cooler.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The ice chutes on both soda dispensers up front need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of cups and flat lids were stored on the floor in the back stockroom.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Pizza boxes on the shelf below the pizza ovens were not inverted.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. The paper towel dispenser for the back hand sink by the fryer did not work.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
